examples: The lure of this view — egoism — has two sources, one psychological, the other logical.
It was not egoism or narcissism, he insisted.
To repent of egoism: is autobiography the best method?
Mr. Gingrich is a gifted and knowledgeable politician, traits that have also given rise to a certain egoism and lack of discipline.
We may be entering a new era of national egoism.
